On-screen text 'hololive 3rd Generation Live' confirmed the source. A search for 'Hololive 3rd Generation "Kyuru Kyuru" song lyrics' identified the song title as 'kyuru‚ėÜcheer' („Āć„āÖ„āč‚ėÜ„Ā°„Āā). Lyrics were retrieved using the search results. The video was then structured into scenes based on the performance progression.
